<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Messages; use JsonException; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; use Psr\Http\Message\ResponseInterface; use Vonage\Client\Exception as ClientException; use Vonage\Client\Exception\ThrottleException; use function json_decode; class ExceptionErrorHandler { /** * @throws ClientException\Request * @throws ClientException\Server * @throws ThrottleException|JsonException */ public function __invoke(ResponseInterface $response, RequestInterface $request) { $responseBody = json_decode( $response->getBody()->getContents(), true, 512, JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR ); $statusCode = (int)$response->getStatusCode(); if ($statusCode === 429) { throw new ThrottleException( $responseBody['title'] . ': ' . $responseBody['detail'], $response->getStatusCode() ); } if ($statusCode >= 500 && $statusCode <= 599) { throw new ClientException\Server($responseBody['title'] . ': ' . $responseBody['detail']); } $message = $responseBody['title'] ?? ''; if (isset($responseBody['detail'])) { $message .= ': ' . $responseBody['detail']; } throw new ClientException\Request($message); } }
